basic_details.job_title: Central Sanskrit University Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 40 years Maximum Age: Not specified

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Accounting with Second Division or above, Minimum Five years of experience in accounting job, Good knowledge of basics of accounting, TDS & bank operations, Operate and guide & train staff to operate tally software
qualification.details: Bachelor's Degree in Accounting with Second Division or above. Minimum Five years of experience in an accounting job. Good knowledge of basics of accounting, TDS & bank operations. Ability to operate and train staff to operate Tally software.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Sanskrit University Consultant (Finance and Accounts) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Central Sanskrit University Consultant (Finance and Accounts) Job 2026

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Central Sanskrit University Consultant (Finance and Accounts) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 20th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the university before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant (Finance and Accounts) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree in Accounting with Second Division or above. Practical experience in accounting is also a key requirement.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Consultant (Finance and Accounts) post is 40 years. There is no upper age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Consultant position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a fixed monthly salary of Rs. 50,000.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Consultant (Finance and Accounts) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position. Selected candidates will be appointed on a contract basis for the duration of the project or as per university terms.

faq.question: Q8. What specific skills are required for the Consultant (Finance and Accounts) role?
faq.answer: Besides accounting basics, candidates need good knowledge of TDS, bank operations, and proficiency in operating and training others on Tally software.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Central Sanskrit University located?
faq.answer: The Central Sanskrit University is located in Puri, Odisha, with the pincode 752001.

faq.question: Q10. How can I get the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all detailed information about the recruitment.
